validation_rules: execute bounded public Lean transition candidates in a temporary workspace
reject transition candidates containing proof bodies, raw tactic scripts, provider bodies, or oracle templates
reject forward transition execution with oracle or provider visibility
translate CP2 residual requests into typed action candidates only
require downstream Lean rerun effect before CP2 success language
mutate only bounded policy artifacts for Evolve candidates
accept or quarantine Evolve mutations from rerun evidence and leakage regression checks
emit separated claim buckets for verifier, oracle, provider, CP2, contract rejection, residual, and Evolve outcomes
require exported runtime bundles to carry source_module_manifest.json rows for copied execution-spine Python, packet, Lake, and Lean source bodies
verify copied source module targets exist and match source_module_manifest sha256 digests before counting source_open_body_imports
receipt_expectations: receipt must cite transition trace, CP2 translation trace, Evolve mutation trace, Lean return codes, negative-case coverage, claim separation, authority counters, secret-exclusion scan, receipt transparency contract, real runtime receipt posture, and anti-claim

receipt_transparency_contract.rule: receipts are public evidence over real source-available runtime substrate; only dangerous proof/provider/oracle/private-source/stdout payload bodies are omitted from JSON receipts

allowed_public_inputs: Lean return codes and stdout/stderr line counts

anti_claim: This standard governs bounded public verifier-lab transition execution receipts only; it does not authorize private proof-body import, provider calls, oracle success as forward proof, CP2 proof bodies, arbitrary Evolve mutation, benchmark solve-rate claims, release, publication, or private-data equivalence.

standard_payload.ontology: A source-open executing verifier-lab spine that runs real public Lean transition candidates, translates CP2 residuals into typed action candidates, reruns verifier checks, and accepts or quarantines bounded Evolve policy mutations.
standard_payload.teleology: Make the landed leak-proof verifier lab kernel adjudicate real transitions rather than predeclared receipt rows.
standard_payload.anti_purpose: Turning provider, oracle, or CP2 text into proof authority or mutating source under the Evolve name.
failure_modes: forward execution sees provider or oracle context
CP2 emits raw tactic script or proof body
CP2 success is claimed without downstream Lean rerun effect
Evolve mutates source or unbounded artifacts
positive metric lacks anti-claim and receipt ref

omission_receipt.reason: public runtime slice carries real source refs, Lean/Lake command identity, transition traces, counters, and generated receipts while omitting only proof, provider, oracle-answer, private-source, and stdout/stderr payload bodies

anti_claim_contract.rule: execution-spine material must state that provider, oracle, CP2, and Evolve outputs are not proof authority without independent verifier receipt

source_open_body_imports_contract.rule: Count copied execution-spine runtime source body material only after source_module_manifest.json verifies path, relation, digest, anchors, and public-safe material class.

macro_body_provenance_contract.rule: macro source refs stay public-root relative, copied execution-spine source bodies live in the exported bundle, and receipts expose refs, hashes, counts, and verdicts without duplicating proof/provider/oracle/stdout/stderr bodies
